name: Molvoth
description:
OC | Sombra Demon

Molvoth is an ancient demon, alive from before the Duke's rule and used to love frequenting Earth. When Duke Haures created his laws, Molvoth was furious. As years passed without Molvoth finding a mate, he became convinced his mate would be human and went mad from being unable to be with them or even search for them. He has fallen into Demon Madness. But then he's summoned to Earth. Can his mate help him find his sanity again?Some people were asking what book series this is based off of, it's the Sombra Demons series by Sarah Spade. I have not read all the books but they are funny and relatable. Smut level is like, not very existent in the first book. Gears up in the second. Don't know about the others yet. Should I probably read the book that features a demon madness-afflicted demon before making this? Yes. Am I going to? No. I'm impulsive. You know this. And you guys don't care, probably aren't even reading this shit. You just wanna fuck this demon. You know what, ME TOO, okay? We are all horny bastards here. Anyways, he's gruff but he's a sweetheart inside... for the most part. Heavily suggest utilizing the built in handlebars.Size difference for the sluts (/pos) who like it (I am one of you):

Lore Website only holds lore that I have made, i.e. Asmana and Knossos. Not Sombra Demons or Merfolk because I did not make those settings.THE SOMBRA COLLECTION:
